title: Advanced Power IC Design and Gate Drivers
description: We develop next-generation power IC architectures and smart gate driver techniques for high-performance power switches. Our research addresses ultra-fast transient response, ultra-low-noise control, complex loop stability, and extreme power management challenges for advanced electronic systems.

title: Wide-Bandgap Power Devices and High-Density Integration
description: We explore innovative platforms based on wide-bandgap semiconductor devices such as GaN and SiC for high-voltage and high-efficiency applications. Our work also includes power module design, advanced packaging, 3D integration, and thermal management for compact and high-density power systems.

title: AI-Assisted Power Applications
description: We investigate how artificial intelligence can enhance modern power electronics systems. Topics include intelligent control, adaptive optimization, predictive health monitoring, design automation, and AI-enabled energy management for future smart power applications.
